property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\Java11\jdk-11.0.22\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\csp\Desktop\Maven\apache-maven-3.8.4\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Sublime Text;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Users\csp\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.1.2\bin;;;.

testcase.name: testFilterByMultipleAmenities
testcase.system-out: 10:27:22.683 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 7: Filter by multiple amenities --- 10:27:22.685 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - GET Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/hotels/filter 10:27:22.685 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: destination = Paris 10:27:22.686 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: amenities = WiFi,Pool,Gym 10:27:23.250 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 200 10:27:23.251 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Amenities filter applied

testcase.name: testCreateBookingWithMissingFields
testcase.system-out: 10:27:23.258 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 9: Create booking with missing fields --- 10:27:23.259 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - POST Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/bookings 10:27:23.259 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Request Body: { "destination": "Paris", "checkIn": "2024-03-10" } 10:27:23.298 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 400 10:27:23.299 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Returns 400 (error as expected)

testcase.name: testFilterByPriceRange
testcase.system-out: 10:27:23.304 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 6: Filter by price range --- 10:27:23.305 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - GET Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/hotels/filter 10:27:23.306 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: destination = Paris 10:27:23.306 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkIn = 2024-03-10 10:27:23.306 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkOut = 2024-03-15 10:27:23.307 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: priceMin = 100 10:27:23.307 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: priceMax = 200 10:27:23.763 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 200 10:27:23.764 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Price range filter applied 10:27:23.833 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ All 2 hotels within price range

testcase.name: testHotelObjectStructure
testcase.system-out: 10:27:23.841 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 12: Verify hotel object structure --- 10:27:23.841 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - GET Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/hotels/search 10:27:23.841 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: destination = Paris 10:27:23.841 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkIn = 2024-03-10 10:27:23.842 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkOut = 2024-03-15 10:27:24.381 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 200 10:27:24.680 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ All required hotel fields present 10:27:24.680 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ID: 1, Name: Hilton Paris, Price: 150.0, Rating: 4.5

testcase.name: testSearchWithMissingParameters
testcase.system-out: 10:27:24.686 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 2: Search with missing parameters --- 10:27:24.687 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - GET Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/hotels/search 10:27:24.687 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkIn = 2024-03-10 10:27:24.687 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkOut = 2024-03-15 10:27:24.726 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 400 10:27:24.727 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Returns 400 (error response as expected)

testcase.name: testFilterByRating
testcase.system-out: 10:27:24.732 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 5: Filter by rating --- 10:27:24.733 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - GET Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/hotels/filter 10:27:24.734 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: destination = Paris 10:27:24.735 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkIn = 2024-03-10 10:27:24.735 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkOut = 2024-03-15 10:27:24.736 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: rating = 4.5 10:27:25.191 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 200 10:27:25.192 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Filter request successful 10:27:25.225 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ All 2 hotels have rating >= 4.5

testcase.name: testCreateBookingWithInvalidDates
testcase.system-out: 10:27:25.230 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 10: Create booking with invalid dates --- 10:27:25.231 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - POST Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/bookings 10:27:25.231 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Request Body: { "hotelId": 123, "checkIn": "2024-03-15", "checkOut": "2024-03-10", "guests": { "adults": 2 } } 10:27:25.279 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 400 10:27:25.280 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Invalid dates rejected with status: 400

testcase.name: testSearchHotelsWithValidParameters
testcase.system-out: 10:27:26.009 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - --- TEST 1: Search with valid parameters --- 10:27:26.010 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - GET Request to: http://localhost:8080/v1/hotels/search 10:27:26.011 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: destination = Paris 10:27:26.011 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkIn = 2024-03-10 10:27:26.011 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: checkOut = 2024-03-15 10:27:26.012 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: adults = 2 10:27:26.012 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Param: children = 1 10:27:26.571 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - Response Status: 200 10:27:26.571 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Status code is 200 10:27:26.599 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Found 5 hotels 10:27:26.626 [main] INFO com.trivago.automation.api.tests.HotelsAPITest - ✓ Response has status field
